title: haydenoxylon gentryi
side_effects: Haydenoxylon gentryi can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, including anaphylaxis, skin irritation, and respiratory issues. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap or extracts can cause skin burns, blisters, and potentially permanent scarring. Improper handling or preparation of the plant can also result in neurological symptoms, including headaches, dizziness, and even coma in extreme cases.
